Tests for displaying current time, GMT, and local time on a Pebble smartwatch application, build scripts, and metadata.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Tests for displaying current time, GMT, and local time on a Pebble smartwatch application.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies to ignore build generated files in the version control system.
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the gmtime_localtime_test app, including UUID, version, and target platforms.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with options for app and worker binaries.
